title: Budget to include additional salary
doc_html:
§458.  Budget to include additional salary

The police juries of said parishes shall annually, at the time they prepare their general budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salary fixed in R.S. 16:457.  

Added by Acts 1950, No. 13, §3.
